criteriaResults.evidence: pure mapping, severity 5/3 documented + FindingSchema.parse validated

REPRODUCED: file blocking mkdir of .bober/memory -> runStandaloneSecurityAudit REJECTS (EEXIST) before thresholdVerdict; CLI catch-all flips clean audit to exit 2; same unguarded pattern in security-gate.ts breaks its 'NEVER throws' invariant (would propagate into pipeline.ts:454)
criteriaResults.feedback: ensureFactsDir + new FactStore sit OUTSIDE try/catch at both call sites; only emitSecurityFindings is guarded. Wrap the ENTIRE default-sink sequence (ensureFactsDir -> new FactStore -> emitSecurityFindings -> close) in one try/catch/finally at BOTH call sites; log via logger.warn; resolve normally.

criteriaResults.evidence: real-store dedup proven in temp dirs at 3 boundaries
no z.object; type-only Finding import; src/hub/ untouched; deriveFindingId replica judged contract-consistent (3rd copy = drift risk, low advisory)

regressions.description: evaluateSecurityGate 'NEVER throws' invariant (sprint-3) broken by unguarded default-sink store setup; reproduced EEXIST rejection flips clean audit to blocked

generatorFeedback.description: Default-sink path unguarded: ensureFactsDir()/new FactStore() errors propagate as unhandled rejections (also src/cli/commands/security-audit.ts:196-226). A hub fs failure (disk full, EACCES, blocked path, locked db) IS the 'hub ingest failure' sc-6-2 requires to be caught.
generatorFeedback.expected: Wrap the full sequence in a single try/catch/finally at both call sites; logger.warn on failure; never propagate. Add regression tests using the reproduction (touch <tmp>/.bober/memory as a FILE so mkdir fails) asserting: gate resolves with verdict unchanged; CLI resolves exitCode 0 for a non-blocking audit.
generatorFeedback.reproduction: mkdir -p <tmp>/.bober && touch <tmp>/.bober/memory; call runStandaloneSecurityAudit with projectRoot=<tmp>, hub:true, important-only findings, standaloneBlockOn:'critical' -> expected {exitCode:0}, actual rejection EEXIST.

generatorFeedback.description: deriveFindingId sha256 formula now has 3 copies (finding-store.ts private, research/runner.ts, security-hub.ts) — drift risk, future consolidation

summary: 4/5 criteria pass with strong real-store coverage, but sc-6-2 FAILS on a reproduced critical defect: unguarded hub-store setup can reject and flip a clean audit to blocked, breaking the gate's never-throws invariant. FAIL iteration 1.
